observed: Cloudflare deployment remains blocked pending valid CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN in the cloudflare-research GitHub environment.

inferred: Exact-scope signer authorization closes a trust gap between cryptographic verification and evidence acceptance, but only after verified fingerprints and authenticated workflow identity are supplied.
proposed: Normalize verified signer fingerprints from GitHub attestation output.
Derive repository, workflow, and ref from authenticated certificate or OIDC identity.
Run evaluate-signer-authorization before build-evidence-acceptance and require status=authorized.
